scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter passenger dev" "pnpm --filter dispatcher dev" "pnpm --filter driver dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter passenger build && pnpm --filter dispatcher build && pnpm --filter driver build
scripts.start: concurrently "pnpm --filter server start" "pnpm --filter passenger preview" "pnpm --filter dispatcher preview" "pnpm --filter driver preview"
